subject: [PATCH v5 08/18] mm: add VM_UFFD_RWP VMA flag

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch adds a new VMA flag, VM_UFFD_RWP, to enable userfaultfd read-write protection (RWP). RWP extends the existing write-protection mechanism to also trap reads on protected ranges. The patch introduces the necessary infrastructure, including helpers and documentation updates, but does not yet set or query the flag. It is a preparatory patch for the rest of the series, which will implement userfaultfd read-write protection.
